raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Central Valley is the epicenter of California's water crisis.",
    "Land subsidence, unreliable water supply, and poor water quality are persistent issues in the Central Valley.",
    "The Temperance Flat Reservoir Project aims to address California's long-term water needs.",
    "The UC Davis Center for Watershed Sciences estimated that the 2015 drought cost California $2.7 billion and resulted in the loss of 21,000 jobs.",
    "Fresno County contributes more than $5.6 billion annually to the California economy.",
    "Fifty percent of the census tracts in Assemblymember Arambula's district are in the 95th percentile of the lowest income and most polluted census tracts.",
    "As groundwater aquifers are depleted, water quality also deteriorates.",
    "Many rural communities in the Valley lack financial ability and technical expertise to address long-term water issues."
  ]
}
```
